__prompts__.project_slug: Project name (lowercase, underscores only, e.g. lob_a_churn_prediction)
__prompts__.lob_display_name: Line of business display name (e.g. LOB A)
__prompts__.catalog_name: Unity Catalog catalog name (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.schema_name: Default schema name (leave as 'default' unless instructed otherwise)
__prompts__.workspace_url_dev: Databricks workspace URL for dev (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.workspace_url_staging: Databricks workspace URL for staging (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.workspace_url_prod: Databricks workspace URL for prod (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.spark_version: Databricks runtime version (confirm with hub platform team)
__prompts__.node_type_id: VM node type (confirm with hub platform team - Azure: Standard_DS3_v2, AWS: i3.xlarge)
__prompts__.cluster_policy_id: Cluster policy ID (get this from the hub platform team)
__prompts__.instance_pool_id: Instance pool ID for dev (get this from the hub platform team - speeds up cluster startup, leave empty if not available)
__prompts__.engineer_group: Entra ID / IAM group for your team (e.g. lob-a-engineers@client.com)
__prompts__.mlflow_experiment_path: MLflow experiment path (leave default unless instructed otherwise)
__prompts__.cicd_platform: CI/CD platform (github_actions or azure_devops) - delete the unused folder after generation
